text.title: LB Session Persistence Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (session storage, autoscale, NAT) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Where does the app store session state?

conclusion.verdict: no sticky; remove any stickiness from the LB
cookie-based persistence (LB-inserted or app-managed); IP-hash forbidden
cookie-based default; ip-hash only if cookies impossible
SSL session ID only as last resort
add maxidle/maxlife or expire to the stickiness; invalidate on backend removal

text.example: session_storage=in_process → asg_or_nat=true → cookie-based persistence → bound TTL 1 h → satisfies cookie-over-iphash + sticky-time-bounded.
